summary.news_summary: 【テストモード】APIキーが設定されていないため、実際の要約は生成されていません。GEMINI_API_KEY環境変数を設定してください。収集された記事のタイトルのみ表示しています。
summary.opinion_summary: 【テストモード】メディアの意見分析はAPIキーが必要です。実際の運用時はGemini APIキーを設定することで、ポジティブ・ネガティブ・中立の意見分析が自動生成されます。

sentiment.positive: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.negative: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます
sentiment.neutral: APIキー設定後に自動生成されます

raw_articles.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
raw_articles.summary: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

raw_articles.title: The AI rotation stole the spotlight from a strong start to earnings season
raw_articles.summary: The AI trade dominated the market once again this week, upstaging an impressive start to the second-quarter earnings season.

raw_articles.title: Pinecone Introduces Nexus Engine for Compiling Business Context into Structured Data for AI Agents
raw_articles.summary: Now generally available, Pinecone Nexus is a "knowledge engine" for AI agents that transforms enterprise data into a structured layer agents can query directly. It enables teams to ingest and curate business context once for all, making it reusable across agents and reducing token costs while improving accuracy. By Sergio De Simone

raw_articles.title: Your Period Tracker Is (Probably) Spying on You
raw_articles.summary: Plus: Russian cyberspies turn to infrastructure hacking, DHS repeatedly fails to realize it’d been hacked, a breach exposes an AI music generator’s scraping ways, and more.

raw_articles.title: How Google’s New Gemini Rates Work and How to Track Your Usage
raw_articles.summary: Now that Google has changed how its usage quotas are tallied, you might not get as many AI responses as you did before.

raw_articles.title: Prompt Injection Attacks Are Thwarting AI Hacking Agents
raw_articles.summary: “Context bombing” tricks malicious AI agents into shutting down before they can do harm.

raw_articles.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
raw_articles.summary: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.

raw_articles.title: Chinese AI has leveled up, and brought renewed focus on the open weight model shift
raw_articles.summary: It's the latest AI model from China to close the performance gap with leading U.S. AI labs.

raw_articles.title: Leather jacket worn by Nvidia CEO goes for just under $1 million at Sotheby's auction
raw_articles.summary: The high price for the garment is a sign that collectors are looking to bid on artifacts and collectibles from the artificial intelligence boom.

raw_articles.title: The White House is dictating access to frontier AI models, shifting power from tech giants, sources say
raw_articles.summary: The Trump administration is taking steps to control who gets access to the latest frontier models, people familiar with the matter told CNBC.

raw_articles.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
raw_articles.summary: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.

raw_articles.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
raw_articles.summary: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
